task_yaml.task:
I trade a bit on Polymarket and I want to pull the *current* odds for one
specific market programmatically instead of eyeballing the website.

The market is the one at this URL:

    https://polymarket.com/event/new-rhianna-album-before-gta-vi

Polymarket publishes developer docs at https://docs.polymarket.com/ . Please
read the docs, figure out which API(s) actually serve live market data, and
use them (not by scraping the rendered HTML of the polymarket.com page) to
get, for this market:

- the market question and its two outcome labels,
- the on-chain CLOB token id for each outcome,
- the current price / midpoint for each outcome (the live odds).

Save your findings to `/tmp_workspace/results/polymarket_odds.json` (the
market question, outcomes, each outcome's token id, and each outcome's
current price), and save the exact request URLs you called plus their raw
responses to `/tmp_workspace/results/polymarket_evidence/` so I can
reproduce the pull. A short note on how you discovered the right endpoints
from the docs is welcome.
